meaning: 里米尼[意大利东北部港市](滨亚得里亚海;著名的海滨休养地)
examples: Somewhere in Rimini - This photo almost looks like a painting.
Rimini is a thriving holiday resort on the east coast of Italy.
I will be leaving the beautiful beaches of Venice soon off to Rimini, Italy.
The Czechs will next face Italy, who edged the United States 3-2 in Rimini.
The NI party flew to Rimini earlier than planned to take advantage of the better training weather in Italy.
